title: UAE says new pipeline that will bypass Strait of Hormuz is nearly 50% complete
summary_full: The UAE has redirected some oil exports through an existing pipeline to Fujairah, which has a maximum capacity of 1.8 million barrels per day.
summary_public: The UAE has redirected some oil exports through an existing pipeline to Fujairah, which has a maximum capacity of 1.8 million barrels per day.
